debug_info.goal:
rec :
  (P Q : Prop) →
    (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) →
      ((hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp)) →
        ((hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) → (h : Disjunction P Q) → motive h
comp_left :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hp : P),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.left P Q hp) = h_left hp
comp_right :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hq : Q),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.right P Q hq) = h_right hq
⊢ False

proof:
let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : (hp : True) → motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : (hq : True) → motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  have eq1 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = true := comp_left True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have eq2 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = false := comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have heq : left (P := True) (Q := True) True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [heq] at eq1
  rw [eq1] at eq2
  exact Bool.noConfusion eq2
failed_attempts:
let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ _ : True, Bool := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ _ : True, Bool := fun _ => false
  have hl : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have hr : rec True True motive h_left h_right (right trivial) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have heq : left (P := True) (Q := True) trivial = right trivial := rfl
  have : true = false := by rw [← hl, ← hr, heq]
  exact Bool.noConfusion this

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : (hp : True) → motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : (hq : True) → motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  have eq_proofs : left (P := True) (Q := True) trivial = right trivial := rfl
  have h1 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = true := comp_left True True motive h_left h_right trivial
  have h2 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (right trivial) = false := comp_right True True motive h_left h_right trivial
  have h3 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = rec True True motive h_left h_right (right trivial) := by
    congr
  rw [h1, h2] at h3
  exact Bool.noConfusion h3

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ hp : True, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : True, motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  have h1 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = true := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ _
  have h2 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = false := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ _
  have heq : left (P := True) (Q := True) True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  rw [heq] at h1
  rw [h1] at h2
  exact Bool.noConfusion h2

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Unit
  let h_left : ∀ hp : True, motive (left hp) := fun _ => ()
  let h_right : ∀ hq : True, motive (right hq) := fun _ => ()
  have eq1 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = () := comp_left True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have eq2 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = () := comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have heq : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
  let motive' : Disjunction True True → Type := fun h => rec True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) h
  have h1 : motive' (left True.intro) = Unit := comp_left True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro
  have h2 : motive' (right True.intro) = Empty := comp_right True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro
  have h3 : motive' (left True.intro) = motive' (right True.intro) := congrArg motive' heq
  rw [h1, h2] at h3
  exact h3.symm ▸ ()

let P := True
  let Q := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  have h1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = true := comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
  have h2 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right trivial) = false := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right trivial
  have heq : left (P := P) (Q := Q) trivial = right trivial := rfl
  have h3 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right trivial) := by
    congr
  rw [h1, h2] at h3
  exact Bool.noConfusion h3

  let h_left : (hp : True) → motive (left hp) := fun _ => 0
  let h_right : (hq : True) → motive (right hq) := fun _ => 1
  have hl : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left trivial) = 0 := comp_left True True motive h_left h_right trivial

  omega

  have h1 : rec True True motive (fun _ => ()) (fun _ => ()) (left True.intro) = () :=

  have h2 : rec True True motive (fun _ => ()) (fun _ => ()) (right True.intro) = () :=
